textContent:
What about something less tragic but still related? Nova, Bellatrix (Bella or Trixie), Carina, Celeste, Amalthea (Thea), Aurora, Halley, Alina, Stella, Danica, Juliet, Leda (Jupiter’s moon), Rhea

So many good options!

What about a Jovian moon? There’s several good choices, Elara, Leda, Métis. Or some of the more off the wall ones, Adrastea, Amalthea or Callisto.
